creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, this is a general support question not a PR.  Please 
look at the Questions mailinglist pages (http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions) 
and subscribe there to ask your question.  There are a lot of 
cluefull people that can help you with this.  If it is still 
believed to be a PR , please get back to me with additional 
information (``boot -v``, ``pciconf -vl`` for example) so that 
we can properly resolve this. 

That said: Thanks for using FreeBSD and taking the time to 
report this!
